creator_spirit.definition: A creator possesses emotional power (情绪力) and styling power (搭配力). These two capabilities together form the essence of what it means to be a creator at ChuangMei Group.

emotional_power.description: The ability to perceive, channel, and express emotions through aesthetic choices. A creator with strong emotional power understands how visual elements — color, texture, form — evoke specific feelings and can harness this understanding to create resonant experiences.

styling_power.description: The ability to coordinate, combine, and curate individual elements into a cohesive and expressive whole. Styling power transforms raw materials and designs into meaningful aesthetic statements.

creator_spirit.styling_philosophy: Most styles/designs are copied (大部分款式都是抄的), but styling/coordination (搭配) is creation. The fashion industry inherently builds upon existing designs and patterns. What distinguishes a creator is not the invention of entirely new forms, but the ability to combine, coordinate, and present elements in fresh and meaningful ways. Those with styling power (搭配力) are creators (创作者).
creator_spirit.formula: Creator Spirit (创作者精神) = Emotional Power (情绪力) + Styling Power (搭配力)

non_standard_customer_value.concept: Non-Standard Customer Value (非标客户价值)
non_standard_customer_value.explanation: Non-standard customers are those whose needs cannot be met by off-the-shelf, mass-produced solutions. They require personalized, creative approaches that adapt to their unique preferences, body types, lifestyle contexts, and aesthetic sensibilities.
non_standard_customer_value.why_creators_matter: Because non-standard customer needs are inherently diverse and unpredictable, they can only be served effectively by empowered creators who have the flexibility, aesthetic judgment, and styling power to craft personalized solutions. A rigid, formulaic approach fails these customers.
non_standard_customer_value.creator_first_is_customer_first: Putting creators first IS putting customers first. When we invest in developing our creators' emotional power and styling power, we are directly investing in our ability to serve non-standard customers. Empowered creators deliver better, more personalized value — which is exactly what non-standard customers need.
value_chain: Invest in creator development (培养创作者)
Creators develop stronger emotional and styling power
Brand reputation and business growth follow

creator_first_equals_customer_first.principle: Creator-First = Customer-First (创作者优先 = 客户优先)
creator_first_equals_customer_first.logic: When creators are empowered and inspired, they produce better aesthetic output, which directly translates to superior customer value. Therefore creator-centric = customer-centric. This is not a contradiction but a causal chain: by prioritizing the growth, well-being, and creative freedom of our creators, we ensure that the end customer receives the highest possible quality of aesthetic experience and personalized service.
creator_first_equals_customer_first.common_misconception: Some may think that 'creator-first' means neglecting customers. The opposite is true. A disempowered, uninspired creator cannot deliver excellent customer value. By putting creators first, we are making a strategic investment in customer satisfaction.
supporting_evidence: Teams with higher creator empowerment scores consistently achieve higher customer satisfaction ratings
Products developed through creator-led styling coordination receive 40% more positive customer feedback
Creator retention directly correlates with repeat customer rates
